xhtml:iframe.srcdoc:
<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"> <title>Library | Zephware</title> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fredoka:wght@300..700&display=swap"> <style>#zw-navbar,#zw-settings-btn{display:flex;align-items:center}#zw-hamburger,#zw-search,.zw-nav-link:hover,.zw-search-clear:hover,body{color:var(--text)}#zw-search,*,.zw-hero-play{font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif}#zw-navbar,body{background:var(--bg)}.zw-card-progress-label,.zw-card-title{white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis}#zw-movie-description,#zw-show-description{padding:20px;transition:background .3s,border-color .3s}#zw-episode-list,#zw-movie-description,#zw-navbar,#zw-show-description,#zw-suggestion-form{transition:background .3s,border-color .3s}.zw-hero-badge,.zw-result-meta,.zw-section-title{text-transform:uppercase}*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none}:root{--blue:#3b82f6;--blue-dim:rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12);--blue-border:rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.35);--bg:#111111;--surface:#1a1a1a;--surface2:#222222;--border:#2a2a2a;--text:#e8e8e8;--text-dim:#aaaaaa;--muted:#666666}body{overflow-x:hidden;transition:background .3s,color .3s}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:0;height:0}#zw-navbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:60px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 36px;z-index:100;gap:0}#zw-logo{font-size:24px;font-weight:600;color:var(--blue);margin-right:44px;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s,color .3s;letter-spacing:-.5px;flex-shrink:0}#zw-logo:hover{opacity:.7}#zw-nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;flex:1}.zw-nav-link{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:15px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:color .15s;position:relative;white-space:nowrap}.zw-hero-separator,.zw-nav-link.active{color:var(--blue)}.zw-nav-link.active::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-20px;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--blue);transition:background .3s}#zw-search{padding:8px 14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:14px;outline:0;width:200px;transition:border-color .15s,width .2s,background .3s}#zw-settings-btn,.zw-scroll-arrow{border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer}#zw-search::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}#zw-search:focus{border-color:var(--blue);width:240px}#zw-settings-btn{width:34px;height:34px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;justify-content:center;margin-left:12px;transition:.15s;flex-shrink:0}#zw-settings-btn:hover,.zw-audio-btn:hover,.zw-control-btn:hover,.zw-theme-chip:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue)}#zw-settings-btn.active,.zw-control-btn.active,.zw-theme-chip.active{background:var(--blue-dim);border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue)}#zw-hamburger{display:none;width:34px;height:34px;background:0 0;border:none;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-left:8px;flex-shrink:0}#zw-theme-switch{visibility:hidden;display:none}#zw-hero,.zw-hero-banner{position:relative;display:flex}#zw-content{margin-top:60px;padding:36px;min-height:calc(100vh - 60px)}#zw-hero{height:440px;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:44px;align-items:flex-end;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border)}.zw-hero-banner{width:100%;height:100%;background-size:cover;background-position:center;align-items:flex-end}.zw-hero-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,.92) 0,rgba(0,0,0,.2) 60%,transparent 100%)}.zw-hero-content,.zw-row-wrapper{position:relative}.zw-hero-content{z-index:1;padding:36px 40px;width:100%}.zw-hero-badge{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#fff;margin-bottom:12px;transition:background .3s}.zw-hero-title{font-size:44px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;color:#fff;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.3px}.zw-hero-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:22px;font-size:14px;color:#999}.zw-hero-play{padding:11px 30px;background:var(--blue);border:none;border-radius:6px;color:#fff;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s,transform .15s,background .3s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.zw-hero-play:hover{opacity:.85;transform:translateY(-1px)}.zw-hero-placeholder{position:relative;z-index:1;text-align:center;width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--surface);transition:background .3s}.zw-hero-placeholder h1{font-size:58px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--blue)}.zw-hero-placeholder p{font-size:20px;color:var(--muted)}.zw-section{margin-bottom:44px}.zw-section-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}.zw-section-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--muted)}.zw-section-count{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-dim);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;letter-spacing:.04em;transition:color .3s,background .3s}.zw-scroll-arrow,.zw-search-icon{font-size:18px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%)}.zw-row,.zw-sound-row{display:flex;gap:14px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:6px;scroll-behavior:smooth}.zw-scroll-arrow{position:absolute;width:34px;height:34px;background:var(--surface2);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:.15s;z-index:10;color:var(--text);user-select:none}.zw-page-search,.zw-sort-select{border:1px solid var(--border);outline:0;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif}.zw-card:hover .zw-card-overlay,.zw-card:hover .zw-list-btn,.zw-card:hover .zw-remove-progress-btn,.zw-row-wrapper:hover .zw-scroll-arrow{opacity:1}.zw-audio-btn.active,.zw-scroll-arrow:hover,.zw-tag-btn.active{background:var(--blue);border-color:var(--blue);color:#fff}.zw-scroll-arrow.left{left:2px}.zw-scroll-arrow.right{right:2px}.zw-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px}.zw-page-search-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center}.zw-search-icon{position:absolute;left:14px;color:var(--muted);pointer-events:none;line-height:1}.zw-page-search{width:100%;padding:11px 40px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-size:16px;transition:border-color .15s,background .15s}.zw-page-search::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}.zw-page-search:focus{border-color:var(--blue);background:var(--surface2)}.zw-search-clear{position:absolute;right:12px;background:0 0;border:none;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;line-height:1;transition:color .15s}.zw-card,.zw-card-thumb{position:relative;overflow:hidden}.zw-card,.zw-sort-select,.zw-tag-btn{background:var(--surface);cursor:pointer}.zw-sort-select{padding:11px 14px;border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-size:15px;transition:border-color .15s,background .3s;flex-shrink:0;min-width:110px}.zw-sound-card,.zw-tag-btn{border:1px solid var(--border)}.zw-audio-dropdown:hover,.zw-audio-select-dropdown:hover,.zw-form-group input:focus,.zw-form-group select:focus,.zw-form-group textarea:focus,.zw-season-dropdown:hover,.zw-sort-select:focus,.zw-sort-select:hover{border-color:var(--blue)}.zw-audio-dropdown option,.zw-audio-select-dropdown option,.zw-form-group select option,.zw-season-dropdown option,.zw-sort-select option{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text)}.zw-tag-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}.zw-tag-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;color:var(--muted);font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;transition:.15s;white-space:nowrap}.zw-tag-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue);background:var(--blue-dim)}.zw-result-meta{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:18px}.zw-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:18px}.zw-card{border-radius:8px;transition:transform .2s,border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s,background .3s;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-width:185px;max-width:185px;flex-shrink:0}.zw-card-overlay,.zw-card-thumb{align-items:center;display:flex}.zw-card.compact{min-width:155px;max-width:155px}.zw-grid .zw-card,.zw-sounds-grid .zw-sound-card{min-width:unset;width:100%}.zw-grid .zw-card{max-width:unset}.zw-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.zw-card-play-btn:hover,.zw-list-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}.zw-card-thumb{width:100%;aspect-ratio:2/3;background:var(--surface2);background-size:cover;background-position:center;justify-content:center}.zw-card-emoji{font-size:48px;opacity:.4}.zw-card-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}.zw-card-play-btn,.zw-list-btn{font-size:16px;align-items:center}.zw-card-play-btn{width:46px;height:46px;background:var(--blue);border:none;border-radius:50%;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;justify-content:center;transition:transform .15s,background .3s;padding-left:3px}.zw-list-btn,.zw-remove-progress-btn{top:8px;line-height:1;display:flex;transition:.15s;position:absolute;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;opacity:0}.zw-list-btn{right:8px;width:28px;height:28px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:50%;justify-content:center}.zw-list-btn.in-list{opacity:1;background:var(--blue);border-color:var(--blue)}.zw-list-btn:hover{background:var(--blue);border-color:var(--blue)}.zw-remove-progress-btn{left:8px;width:24px;height:24px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:50%;font-size:11px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:5}.zw-remove-progress-btn:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,.85);border-color:rgba(239,68,68,.5);transform:scale(1.1)}.zw-sound-card.playing,.zw-sound-card:hover{background:var(--blue-dim);border-color:var(--blue)}.zw-progress-bar{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15)}.zw-progress-fill{height:100%;background:var(--blue);transition:background .3s}.zw-card-progress-label{position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;right:6px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;letter-spacing:.03em;text-align:center;overflow:hidden}.zw-card-info{padding:11px 13px 12px}.zw-card-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;color:var(--text);overflow:hidden;transition:color .3s}.zw-card-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);transition:color .3s}.zw-audio-btn,.zw-control-btn,.zw-sound-card{transition:.15s;background:var(--surface)}.zw-sounds-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:14px}.zw-sound-card{border-radius:8px;padding:18px 16px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-width:155px;width:155px;flex-shrink:0}.zw-sound-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.zw-sound-card.playing .zw-sound-icon::after{content:' ▐▐';font-size:14px}.zw-sound-icon{font-size:20px}.zw-audio-btn,.zw-sound-title{font-size:14px;color:var(--text)}.zw-sound-title{font-weight:600;line-height:1.3}.zw-audio-btn,.zw-control-btn{font-weight:500;cursor:pointer}#zw-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.95);z-index:200;display:none;overflow-y:auto}#zw-mobile-drawer.open,#zw-overlay.active{display:block}#zw-modal-close{position:fixed;top:16px;right:22px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-size:22px;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:.2s;z-index:201}#zw-movie-video-container,#zw-show-video-container{aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}#zw-modal-close:hover{background:var(--blue);border-color:var(--blue);color:#fff;transform:rotate(90deg)}#zw-movie-modal{padding:88px 44px 44px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}#zw-movie-player{margin-bottom:26px}#zw-movie-video-container{width:100%;margin-bottom:16px;border:1px solid var(--border)}#zw-movie-video,#zw-show-video{width:100%;height:100%}#zw-movie-audio-selector{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center}.zw-audio-btn{padding:9px 24px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif}#zw-movie-info{text-align:center}#zw-movie-title{font-size:32px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text)}#zw-movie-meta{font-size:15px;color:var(--blue)}#zw-show-modal{padding:44px;max-width:100%;margin:0 auto;min-height:100vh}#zw-show-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 350px;gap:24px;min-height:calc(100vh - 120px);max-width:1600px;margin:0 auto}#zw-show-video-area{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;min-height:0}#zw-show-video-container{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}#zw-show-description{background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}#zw-show-description h3{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px}#zw-movie-description .zw-show-meta,#zw-show-description .zw-show-meta{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px}#zw-show-description .zw-show-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}#zw-show-description .zw-tag{padding:4px 10px;background:var(--blue-dim);border:1px solid var(--blue-border);border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;color:var(--blue);text-transform:capitalize;transition:color .3s,background .3s,border-color .3s}#zw-show-controls-buttons{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}.zw-control-btn{padding:10px 16px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--muted);font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:13px;text-align:center;line-height:1.4}.zw-audio-dropdown,.zw-form-group input,.zw-form-group select,.zw-form-group textarea,.zw-season-dropdown{background:var(--bg);outline:0;transition:border-color .15s,background .3s;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif}#zw-episode-list{background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;padding:16px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:calc(100vh - 120px);overflow-y:auto}.zw-episode-controls{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-shrink:0}.zw-audio-dropdown,.zw-season-dropdown{padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-weight:500}#zw-episodes{flex:1;overflow-y:auto}#zw-episodes::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}#zw-episodes::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:2px}.zw-episode-item{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .12s,border-left-color .12s;border-left:3px solid transparent}.zw-episode-item.active,.zw-episode-item:hover{background:var(--blue-dim);border-left-color:var(--blue)}.zw-episode-number{font-size:11px;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:3px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.04em}.zw-episode-name{font-size:13px;color:var(--text);white-space:normal;line-height:1.3}#zw-movie-description{background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin:16px 0;width:100%}#zw-movie-description h3{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px;margin-top:0}.zw-movie-description-text{font-size:14px;color:#ccc;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:14px}.zw-audio-selector-movie{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.zw-audio-selector-movie label{font-size:13px;color:var(--blue);font-weight:600}.zw-audio-select-dropdown{padding:7px 12px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:#fff;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .15s}.zw-submit-btn,.zw-toggle input:checked+.zw-toggle-slider{background:var(--blue)}#zw-suggestions{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;padding:44px 20px}.zw-suggestions-title{font-size:34px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text);text-align:center}.zw-suggestions-desc{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-bottom:32px;line-height:1.6}#zw-suggestion-form{background:var(--surface);border-radius:10px;padding:28px;border:1px solid var(--border)}.zw-form-group{margin-bottom:18px}.zw-form-group label{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:6px}.zw-form-group input,.zw-form-group select,.zw-form-group textarea{width:100%;padding:10px 13px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text);font-size:14px}.zw-form-group input::placeholder,.zw-form-group textarea::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}.zw-form-group textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:110px}.zw-submit-btn{width:100%;padding:12px;border:none;border-radius:6px;color:#fff;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .15s,background .3s}.zw-submit-btn:hover{opacity:.85}#zw-form-message{margin-top:14px;padding:12px;border-radius:6px;text-align:center;font-weight:500;min-height:20px}.zw-form-success{background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.4);color:#4ade80}.zw-form-error{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.4);color:#f87171}.zw-empty-state{text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;color:var(--muted)}.zw-empty-state-icon{font-size:56px;margin-bottom:14px;opacity:.35}.zw-empty-state-text{font-size:17px}#zw-settings-page{max-width:720px;margin:0 auto;padding:12px 0 60px}.zw-settings-title{font-size:32px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:32px}.zw-settings-section{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:20px;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s,border-color .3s}.zw-settings-section-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);padding:16px 20px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}#zw-toast,.zw-settings-label{color:var(--text);font-size:14px}.zw-settings-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}.zw-settings-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}.zw-settings-label{font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px}#zw-toast,.zw-theme-chip{background:var(--surface2);font-weight:500}.zw-settings-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;max-width:380px}.zw-danger-btn,.zw-theme-chip{font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:13px;white-space:nowrap}.zw-theme-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}.zw-theme-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;color:var(--text-dim);cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}.zw-theme-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}.zw-toggle{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:44px;height:24px;flex-shrink:0}.zw-toggle input{opacity:0;width:0;height:0}.zw-toggle-slider{position:absolute;cursor:pointer;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:var(--border);border-radius:24px;transition:background .2s}.zw-danger-btn,.zw-drawer-link{cursor:pointer;transition:.15s}.zw-toggle-slider::before{position:absolute;content:'';height:18px;width:18px;left:3px;bottom:3px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;transition:transform .2s}.zw-toggle input:checked+.zw-toggle-slider::before{transform:translateX(20px)}.zw-danger-btn{padding:8px 16px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);border-radius:6px;color:#f87171;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0}.zw-danger-btn:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);border-color:rgba(239,68,68,.6)}#zw-toast{position:fixed;bottom:32px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 24px;border-radius:8px;z-index:9999;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s,transform .25s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap}#zw-toast.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}#zw-mobile-drawer{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:300;display:none}#zw-drawer-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6)}#zw-drawer-panel{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;width:260px;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:24px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;transform:translateX(0)}.zw-drawer-logo{font-size:22px;font-weight:600;color:var(--blue);margin-bottom:16px}.zw-drawer-link{padding:12px 14px;border-radius:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:16px;font-weight:500}.zw-drawer-link.active,.zw-drawer-link:hover{background:var(--blue-dim);color:var(--blue)}@media (max-width:1024px){#zw-show-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;height:auto}#zw-show-modal{height:auto;overflow-y:auto}#zw-episode-list{max-height:500px}.zw-theme-chips{gap:6px}}@media (max-width:768px){#zw-navbar{padding:0 16px}#zw-logo{font-size:20px;margin-right:0}#zw-nav-links,#zw-settings-btn{display:none}#zw-search{width:130px;font-size:13px}#zw-search:focus{width:165px}#zw-hamburger{display:flex}#zw-content{padding:16px}#zw-hero{height:300px;margin-bottom:28px}.zw-hero-title{font-size:28px}.zw-hero-content{padding:24px 20px}.zw-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(145px,1fr));gap:12px}.zw-sounds-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr))}.zw-card{min-width:150px;max-width:150px}#zw-show-modal{padding:10px}#zw-movie-modal{padding:76px 18px 26px}#zw-settings-page{padding:12px 0 40px}.zw-settings-row{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px}.zw-settings-row .zw-sort-select,.zw-theme-chips{width:100%}.zw-settings-row .zw-toggle{align-self:flex-end}.zw-settings-row .zw-danger-btn{align-self:flex-start}}@media (max-width:480px){#zw-navbar{height:54px;padding:0 12px}#zw-content{margin-top:54px;padding:12px}#zw-hero{height:230px}.zw-hero-title{font-size:20px}.zw-hero-play{padding:9px 18px;font-size:14px}.zw-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(128px,1fr));gap:10px}.zw-card{min-width:138px;max-width:138px}#zw-search{width:110px}#zw-search:focus{width:140px}}</style>

<div id="zw-nav-links"> <div class="zw-nav-link active" data-page="home">Home</div> <div class="zw-nav-link" data-page="movies">Movies</div> <div class="zw-nav-link" data-page="shows">Shows</div> <div class="zw-nav-link" data-page="sounds">Sounds</div> <div class="zw-nav-link" data-page="suggestions">Suggestions</div> </div>
<input id="zw-search" placeholder="Search...">
<button id="zw-settings-btn" title="Settings">⚙</button> <button id="zw-hamburger" aria-label="Menu">☰</button> </div>
